Title: Five Nights at Freddy's
Writer: Scott Cawthon, Seth Cuddeback, Emma Tammi
Actors: Josh Hutcherson, Piper Rubio, Elizabeth Lail
Plot: Set in a pizzaria by the name of "Freddy Fazzbears Pizza", A man named Mike Schmidt takes the job of a night guard and must survive the attacks from the mysterious animatronic mascots including the main star, Freddy Fazbear himself. Based of the video game series, Five Night's at Freddy's by Scott Cawthon.
